instructions: Send WhatsApp broadcast via WATI to all warm leads. Include personalized villa pricing and virtual tour link. Segment: leads who clicked ads or opened emails in last 7 days.
message_en:
2 villas remain at this price. After these, no more beachfront at PHP 28M.

Villa D: PHP 28,000,000 | Villa C: PHP 30,000,000
Reserve with just PHP 200,000.
Reply YES for a virtual tour.
message_he:

Villa D: ₪1,420,888 | Villa C: ₪1,522,380
הזמנו עם ₪10,149 בלבד.
השיבו כן לסיור וירטואלי.

instructions: Follow up with leads who replied to the broadcast. Send virtual tour link and offer to schedule a call with sales team.
